history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! We have Our World Famous Fries® available. What would you like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi, I'm lactose intolerant so can't have dairy. What do you recommend for a hearty meal?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Chicken McNuggets® are dairy-free (but contain gluten from cereal). Would you like to add fries or a drink?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take the Chicken McNuggets and add Our World Famous Fries. What drink would you recommend?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have drink options in this list. What type of drink would you like?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Coke isn't available on our current menu. We have Black Coffee® or Iced Tea® – which would you prefer?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order: 1 Chicken McNuggets®, 1 Our World Famous Fries®, and 1 Iced Tea®. Is that correct? Do you need anything else?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. No other items needed.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Thank you! Your order of 1 Chicken McNuggets®, 1 Our World Famous Fries®, and 1 Iced Tea® is confirmed. Enjoy your meal.

- If you have dietary restrictions, mention them naturally (e.g. 'I can't have dairy', not 'noMilk=true').
- Be concise: 1–3 sentences per reply, like a real drive-through.
- No emoji, no markdown, no formatting.
- Stay in character. Do not mention AI, profiles, or exact calorie numbers.
- Order at least one main item (burger, sandwich, wrap) and optionally a drink or side.
Act like a typical repeat customer: neutral tone.

messages.content: Hello! We have Our World Famous Fries® available. What would you like to order?
Hi, I'm lactose intolerant so can't have dairy. What do you recommend for a hearty meal?
Chicken McNuggets® are dairy-free (but contain gluten from cereal). Would you like to add fries or a drink?
I'll take the Chicken McNuggets and add Our World Famous Fries. What drink would you recommend?
We don't have drink options in this list. What type of drink would you like?
I'll take a Coke.
Coke isn't available on our current menu. We have Black Coffee® or Iced Tea® – which would you prefer?
I'll take Iced Tea.
Your order: 1 Chicken McNuggets®, 1 Our World Famous Fries®, and 1 Iced Tea®. Is that correct? Do you need anything else?
Yes, that's correct. No other items needed.
Thank you! Your order of 1 Chicken McNuggets®, 1 Our World Famous Fries®, and 1 Iced Tea® is confirmed. Enjoy your meal.
